notes: Gamma B24 with RST_STREAM(CANCEL): **MAJOR BREAKTHROUGH**. (1) NO MORE ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR — RST_STREAM fix completely resolved the connection-level error that plagued #291/#294/#297. (2) HTTP 400 JSON error was SUCCESSFULLY DELIVERED to the frontend. (3) APF warning text IS in the error body: '민감 정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다' (type: content_policy). (4) Outline generation partially succeeded — the outline request went through and generated content about 주민등록번호 safety, but render-generation (styled image/content generation) was blocked. (5) Fonts from fonts.gstatic.com loaded successfully — no more collateral damage. (6) Warning text is NOT visible to the user — it only appears in console error via StreamOnOpenError. The frontend catches the 400 error but doesn't display it to the user. To make warning visible, need the frontend to render the error message or use a different delivery mechanism.
